settings.custom_liquid: THE LEGACY COLLECTION.

<style>
  /* White clean background */
  .collection-hero {
    background: #ffffff !important;
    padding: 72px 0 88px !important;
  }

  /* Title — Inter 900 large */
  .collection-hero__title {
    display: block !important;
    font-family: 'Inter', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(30px, 5vw, 58px) !important;
    font-weight: 900 !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    color: #111111 !important;
    margin: 0 0 28px !important;
    line-height: 1.05 !important;
  }

  /* Reset wrapper to single column */
  .collection-hero__text-wrapper {
    display: block !important;
    position: relative !important;
  }

  /* Remove injected label */
  .collection-hero__text-wrapper::before {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Decorative line + description */
  .collection-hero__description {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 15px !important;
    font-weight: 300 !important;
    line-height: 1.85 !important;
    color: #555555 !important;
    border-top: 1.5px solid #111111 !important;
    padding-top: 24px !important;
    max-width: 660px !important;
  }

  .collection-hero__description p {
    color: #555555 !important;
    margin-bottom: 14px !important;
  }

  .collection-hero__description p:last-child {
    font-style: italic !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    color: #999999 !important;
    margin-top: 8px !important;
    border-top: none !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  .collection-hero__description strong {
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    color: #222222 !important;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 749px) {
    .collection-hero {
      padding: 48px 0 60px !important;
    }
  }
</style>

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer:
Our orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days.

Estimated Shipping Times:

United States & Canada: 7–12 business days

Europe: 7–12 business days

UAE & Middle East: 10–14 business days

Rest of the World: 7–12 business days

settings.question: What does the warranty include?
settings.answer: Our warranty does not cover damage caused by personal misuse or destruction, and applies only to defects resulting from manufacturing errors or material faults.

settings.question: Any question?
settings.answer: You can reach us through our contact page. We will be happy to assist you.
